name: Zombie
languages: Understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

features.name: Undead Fortitude
features.description: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 Hit Points, it makes a Constitution saving throw (DC 5 plus the damage taken) unless the damage is Radiant or from a Critical Hit. On a successful save, the zombie drops to 1 Hit Point instead.

actions.name: Slam
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) Bludgeoning damage.

tactical_info.tactics: Simple shambling attacks. Undead fortitude makes them surprisingly resilient. Perfect minions for necromancers. Works best in groups.
